caption: A man wearing a white dress shirt, a red bowtie, tan suspenders, and oversized black headphones is speaking into a professional microphone in a studio setting. He is wearing a whimsical, tall, grey wig that stands upright. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a clothing display area featuring white shirts and "LEE" branded apparel. In each shot, a logo on the left reads "PODCAST" below a graphic with "TALK", while a logo on the right says "BOSS TALK JOY". As the sequence progresses, the man remains in a profile view, speaking and slightly shifting his facial expression and head position while maintaining his posture. The camera remains stationary, capturing the subject from the chest up as he engages in a recording session.
